pottukkamaa  (5)

anbu magal
kodeeshwari.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys themes of devotion and love, reflecting a deep emotional connection.

The movie associated with this song is currently unknown.

When was the song released?

The song was released on March 31, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Anbullam Konda Ammavukku is a soothing devotional piece that evokes a sense of peace and tranquility. It reflects themes of love and devotion, inviting listeners to connect with their inner selves. The lyrics express a heartfelt message, making it suitable for relaxation and spiritual reflection. This melody serves as a reminder of the beauty of devotion, creating an emotional atmosphere that resonates deeply.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Anbullam Konda Ammavukku is a beautifully crafted devotional melody that resonates with the soul. The soothing lyrics and serene composition create a tranquil atmosphere, making it a perfect listen for moments of reflection. This song, released in 2016, captures the essence of devotion and love, inviting listeners to immerse themselves in its calming vibe.
stanzaMeanings: The daughter of the loving mother writes a letter.
I am here, I am learning my role.
I wonder how you will be, since there is no one else.
The daughter of the loving mother writes a letter.
You have to send the vessel to school.
Write which animal you will eat. Mother, write which animal you will eat.
You said to send money to buy books.
In the house where the vessel is broken, they still don't give money. Mother, in the house where the vessel is broken, they still don't give money.
The teacher says to buy the book and notes every day.
I will write down the girl you gave me.
The daughter of the loving mother writes a letter.
They speak like fallen beggars.
I cry without being able to bear the pain, mother, I cry without being able to bear the pain.
You said that the old pot will give food in the house.
When it comes, don't forget to buy it.
They throw food waste on the street.
I am eating with the thought of only us siblings.
The daughter of the loving mother writes a letter.
Don't forget the lower part of the house.
Compassion is the only thing that remains, mother, compassion is the only thing that remains.
Don't put the heavy load on the top, let it be light.
The place where the rain is falling is in the heart.
They said that all hands are broken and they are going to the ground.
My heart is in pain, you are the one who has put the blanket on me.
How long will your love be, daughter of Kodeeshwari.
